frontmatter.title: Royal Lands
frontmatter.description: An online multiplayer kingdom-building tile-placement game for 2–4 players, built to learn Go and PixiJS — server-authoritative rules engine, event-sourced SQLite persistence, WebSockets, deployed on Railway.
frontmatter.bannercaption: Draft dominoes, grow your 5x5 kingdom, score crowns
